intro.heading: What I bring to the table
paragraphs: Through my studies and personal projects, I have built a solid foundation in software development across multiple technologies
I enjoy working on both frontend and full-stack development, combining logical problem-solving with creating clear and user-friendly interfaces

One of my key strengths is my ability to leverage AI tools effectively in development. I actively use various agentic systems to support coding, debugging, and learning new concepts. I also take a structured approach by defining project states, risks, and constraints to guide AI usage

groups.title: Backend & Desktop
groups.note: Develop applications and handle core logic behind the scenes.

groups.title: Data & Databases
groups.note: Work with data, storage, and basic analysis.

groups.title: Software Design
groups.note: Plan and structure applications with usability in mind.

groups.title: Tools & Workflow
groups.note: Use tools to build, manage, and document projects.

groups.title: AI-Assisted Development
groups.note: Use AI tools to support coding and learning.
